message:
fix(events): adapt stats_clear_oldest_lag test for asupersync broadcast semantics

asupersync's broadcast `len()` reports ring-buffer occupancy (messages
retained for potential new subscribers) rather than tokio's
slowest-receiver-drain count. Under asupersync, delta_queued can be <=2
after the sole receiver has consumed both messages. Gate the assertion
to accept either semantic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
